reason: Chain-of-thought (CoT) is a highly effective technique for improving the accuracy of complex reasoning tasks. Unlocking it early will help ensure correct answers for higher-level doors.
Unlocking 'pe_plan' provides a planning phase and a reflection call, which significantly increases accuracy and reliability for higher-level questions.
I have 1 SP and 'pe_reflect' provides a dedicated reflection call to review and correct my answers, which significantly increases accuracy and safety for future high-level doors.

Unlocking the 'Enough' skill will provide context for the last 5 Q&A pairs, which is valuable for maintaining consistency and potentially solving puzzles related to previous answers in the 'Dungeon of Self'. I currently have 1 SP and am close to earning another.
I have 1 Skill Point available and unlocking ctx_overload will provide full chat history in every call, which is beneficial for maintaining context and consistency as the dungeon progresses.
